description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every pull request. The workflow has four ubuntu-latest jobs: special_debugRelease for a debug build with coverage, special_releaseValgrind for a release build with valgrind, special_releaseSanitizers for a release build with sanitizers, and special_allEnabled for a build with all options enabled. Each job checks out the repository, installs dependencies, configures Conan, and performs a build and test.
